entity.summary: Internet Computer order-book decentralized exchange supporting token trading pairs, limit orders, router-managed pair creation, on-chain matching infrastructure, and optional order-book AMM liquidity makers.
entity.notes: Current first-party ICLighthouse site is reachable. The official ICDex repository identifies ICDex as an order-book DEX on Internet Computer and documents router, pair, trading, and OAMM maker components. Official 2026 Q1 ecosystem accounting reports ICDex volume and TVL metrics.

evidence.title: ICLightHouse
evidence.notes: Current first-party ICLightHouse application surface remains reachable.

evidence.title: ICDex repository
evidence.notes: First-party repository identifies ICDex as an order-book DEX on Internet Computer and documents router-managed pair creation, trading-pair canisters, limit trading calls, and optional ICDexMaker OAMM liquidity infrastructure.

evidence.title: ICDex Eco-Economy 2026 Q1
evidence.notes: First-party ecosystem accounting records ICDex router revenue, balances, liquidity, total reported volume, and TVL through the 2026 Q1 reporting period.
